pi_items.source: Verified from verifier.py explicit checks and setup_task.sh.
Verified via setup_task.sh defining the package path.
Verified against the task description and verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the world_survey.gpkg contains real-world data (98 world capitals and 8 GBIF field observations). There is a critical contradiction in the task verifier: while the prompt asks to count southern hemisphere capitals from the dataset, the GeoPackage binaries do not have header envelopes (envelope_indicator == 0). The `get_ground_truth` parser in `verifier.py` incorrectly returns `None` for all coordinates, resolving the dataset count to 0 and triggering a fallback condition. This hardcoded fallback expects an arbitrary list of 39 southern capitals, which completely contradicts the 17 actual southern capitals present in the QField data. If an agent performs the task perfectly by identifying the 17 southern capitals from the map, it will be severely penalized for missing the 24 imaginary ones expected by the verifier.
